{"query":"Kamala Harris NAACP Image Awards 2025 speech quotes reactions","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1549,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/naacp-image-awards-2025-kamala-harris-wayans-505a7fc692abd4eceb1f47791ecd3991","title":"Kamala Harris receives prestigious Chairman's prize at NAACP Image Awards | AP News","content":"Former Vice President Kamala Harris accepts the chairman’s award during the 56th NAACP Image Awards on Saturday, Feb.
22, 2025, in Pasadena, Calif.
Chaunté Wayans, from left, Kim Wayans, Marlon Wayans, Damon Wayans Sr., Damon Wayans Jr., and Damien Dante Wayans are given the NAACP Hall of Fame award during the 56th NAACP Image Awards on Saturday, Feb.
“While we have no illusions about what we are up against in this chapter in our American story, this chapter will be written not simply by whoever occupies the oval office nor by the wealthiest among us,” Harris said after receiving the NAACP’s Chairman’s Award.
The 56th annual Image Awards was held at the Pasadena Civic Auditorium in the Los Angeles area.
Image Awards host Deon Cole honored residents of the nearby Altadena neighborhood who were affected by January’s devastating Los Angeles-area wildfires.
“But what was not lost is the spirit of our community,” said Chestnut, who noted 22 Altadena residents attended the show on Saturday."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/tv/news/kamala-harris-naacp-image-awards-speech-1236316510/","title":"Kamala Harris Accepts NAACP's Chairman's Award at 2025 Ceremony","content":"Some see the flames on our horizons, the rising waters in our cities, the shadows gathering over our democracy, and ask, ‘What do we do now?’ But we know exactly what to do, because we have done it before, and we will do it again.”
The audience, which gave the former vice president a standing ovation when she walked on stage, continued to applaud throughout Harris’ speech.
Senator before making history as the first woman, Black American and South Asian American to serve as VP (with President Joe Biden)."},{"url":"https://www.tvinsider.com/1177786/kamala-harris-naacp-image-awards-2025-speech/","title":"Kamala Harris Makes First Post-VP TV Appearance With Invigorating NAACP Image Awards Speech","content":"Accepting the organization’s Chairman’s Award at the Pasadena Civic Auditorium on Saturday night, Harris began by saying she’s been inspired by the NAACP her entire life.
Du Bois: “It is today that our best work can be done and not some future day or future year.” Those words resonate with Harris in the fight for America’s future, she said.
Big winners at the awards show on Saturday night included Abbott Elementary, which won Outstanding Comedy Series while star Quinta Brunson won Outstanding Actress in a Comedy Series, and Poppa’s House, for which father-son team Damon Wayans and Damon Wayans Jr. won Outstanding Actor and Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series, respectively.
On the drama TV side, Cross won Outstanding Drama Series, Power Book II: Ghost’s Michael Rainey Jr. and Method Man won Outstanding Actor and Supporting Actor, respectively; The Equalizer’s Queen Latifah won Outstanding Actress; and The Chi’s Lynn Whitfield won Outstanding Supporting Actress."}]}
